title: Better 3D Animated Mace
description: This resource pack Turns 2D texture of mace into 3D..!!
body:
Tired of your mace looking flat and boring in Minecraft? **Better 3D MACE** which changes that! This resource pack turns the simple 2D texture into a cool 3D model

**Why You'll Love It**  

✅ **No extra mods needed** – Works in pure vanilla Minecraft!         
✅ **Better visuals** – The mace looks more detailed and powerful.        
✅ **Easy to use** – Just install the pack and enjoy!

#
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cff62287c480b3f8502dcb6b6bcc1fdc6f9b30fb.png)


With Better 3D Animated Mace, your mace won’t just be a tool—it’ll feel like a real weapon.
